exhibits.name: Financial Statements

sub_exhibits.name: Audited Consolidated Financial Statements (Hyatt Hotels Corporation)

exhibits.notes: Parent-level financials. Includes Guarantee of Performance (p94-95), Deloitte & Touche audit report (p96-97), income statement (p98), comprehensive income (p99), balance sheet (p100), cash flows (p101-103), notes (p104-159), Schedule II (p160).

exhibits.name: Franchise Application
exhibits.notes: Standard online application form with ownership disclosure, financial statements, credit information.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: 90-page franchise agreement. Includes sub-exhibits: Exhibit A (Guaranty, pp260-266), Exhibit B (Financial Terms), Exhibit C (Right of First Offer), Exhibit D (Reserved), Exhibit E (IT Project Management Services, pp253-256), Exhibit F (Management Company Rider), Exhibit G (Guaranty form), Exhibit H (Guaranty and Assumption).

exhibits.name: Design and Construction Standards
exhibits.notes: 23 pages of design and construction requirements for full-service Hyatt-branded hotels.

exhibits.name: State Administrators / Agents for Service of Process
System Standards Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: TOC only; actual System Standards comprise 3,641 pages (not included in FDD).

exhibits.name: Confidentiality Agreement
exhibits.notes: 6-page confidentiality agreement. Obligations continue 5 years or indefinitely for trade secrets.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 4 pages listing 10 franchised Brand Hotels as of 12/31/2024 with addresses and phone numbers. States: CA, LA, NY, OK, PA, TN.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees Who Left the System
exhibits.notes: 1 page. No franchisees left the system during the most recent fiscal year.

exhibits.name: Central Hotel Services by Hyatt Master Agreement
exhibits.notes: 26-page master agreement with schedules for field marketing, revenue management, central sales, GPGS, digital ancillary services.

exhibits.name: State-Specific Additional Disclosures and Riders
exhibits.notes: 23 pages. Additional disclosures for CA, HI, MD, MN, ND, RI, VA. State-specific riders for MD FA, MD CA, MN FA. State effective dates page. Michigan provisions appear in front matter (pp5-6) not here.
